race.comment: KIRWANS BRIDGE (4) made a mess of his maiden rivals here last start, putting 4L to his nearest rival. Full of confidence now and can make it two on the bounce. SACRED INFERNO (1) was a strong maiden winner two back at Gundagai then went desperately close to doubling up, only denied by a lip at Albury. Only needs to hold his form to be right there again. SLAY QUEEN (9) didn't give her rivals a sniff at Queanbeyan when leading pillar-to-post to shed her maiden tag. Will give herself every chance again pushing forward. LONDON BOY (2) made a great return here 10 days ago when beaten a head. Is sure to have come on from that and draws well again. Have to take seriously. OLINGTON LANE (5) wasted no time getting off the mark, scoring on debut when sent out as favourite at the Sapphire Coast. Keeps Boudvillain and is worth following.
